result.reason: The white screen issue is a known limitation of the outdated VncSharpCore library, which the mRemoteNG project plans to replace. A direct fix for this specific manifestation is not feasible.
result.approach: Defer fix until VncSharpCore is replaced with a modern VNC client library.
